videos.title: this is how you stay in your power ✨
videos.description: Your energy is the foundation of your empowerment—and the world needs you in your power. When you feel good, you have the capacity to take action, show up fully, and do the things that actually matter. Taking care of yourself is never selfish. It's how change begins.

videos.title: you can design how you feel 🌙
videos.description: Your energy is always within reach—and it's something you can shape intentionally. A playlist that shifts your mood, a step outside, a quiet question you ask yourself before the day begins. These small acts of care are more powerful than they seem. They are what keep you grounded, even when everything around you feels heavy.

videos.title: Your energy is contagious 💗
videos.description: Your emotions are contagious—and so is your calm. If you've been living in a state of fear or stress lately, this is your reminder that it doesn't just affect you. It affects the people around you too. Taking care of your energy isn't selfish—it's one of the most loving things you can do. Take care of your mind. Your emotions. Your inner world. And watch how that peace ripples outward. It always starts with you.
